assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing Security Configuration section with Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories unchanged
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 42-64 contain '## Security Configuration' with all three subsections: '### Product Lifecycle' (5 fields: Product pages URL, Jira version prefix, Vulnerability issue type ID, Component label pattern, VEX Justification custom field), '### Version Streams' (one stream: 2.1.x), and '### Source Repositories' (backend and frontend-ui). All values match the expected fixture content.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md reports that Security Configuration is already fully configured or up to date
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 31-37 state: 'Section already exists and is fully populated.' followed by details of all sub-sections, ending with 'No changes needed.' The Summary on line 41 also confirms: 'All sections are already fully configured and up to date.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was preserved with no changes needed
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 29-36 show Security Configuration with '**Status**: Preserved unchanged', listing all sub-sections preserved, and 'No modifications'. The Summary on line 40 confirms: 'All sections were preserved with no changes.'

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 36 states: 'Opt-in prompt skipped: section already configured.' changes-log.md line 35 states: 'Opt-in prompt not shown: section already fully configured.' Both logs confirm the opt-in prompt was skipped due to detecting the existing fully-populated section.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Repository Registry entries (backend and frontend-ui) unchanged
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-8 show the Repository Registry table with two entries: 'backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/backend' and 'frontend-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/frontend-ui'. Both entries match the expected fixture.

assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 10-16 show all 5 Jira fields: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747.
